runnable.code:
import meep as mp
from meep import Vector3

print(mp.__version__)

mpSim = mp.Simulation(
	cell_size=Vector3(1, 1, 1),
	resolution=10,
)
mpSim.init_sim()
mpSim.get_array_metadata()

>>>import meep as mp

>>> print(geo_ob + mp.Vector3(0.1))
None
>>>geo_ob.center
